serviceProviders.description: The name(s) (or abbreviation(s)) of Provider(s) that manage or deliver the Service in federated scenarios.

webpage.description: Webpage with information about the Service usually hosted and maintained by the Provider.

logo.description: Link to the logo/visual identity of the Service. The logo will be visible at the Portal. If there is no specific logo for the Service the logo of the Provider may be used.

scientificDomains.description: The branch of science, scientific discipline that is related to the Service.

tags.description: free text Keywords associated to the Service to simplify search by relevant keywords.

accessType.description: Type of access to the service (e.g. physical, virtual)

jurisdiction.description: The property defines the jurisdiction of the users of the service, based on the vocabulary for this property

trl.description: The Technology Readiness Level of the Service

termsOfUse.description: Webpage describing the rules, Service conditions and usage policy which one must agree to abide by in order to use the Service.

privacyPolicy.description: Link to the privacy policy applicable to the Service.

accessPolicy.description: Information about the access policies that apply.

orderType.description: Information on the order type: if the service is open access of if an order is required.

order.description: Webpage through which an order for the Service can be placed.

relatedInteroperabilityGuidelines.description: Optional. Interoperability Guidelines this service complies with.

interoperabilityGuideline.description: Mandatory. Identifier of the interoperability guideline.

configurationInstance.description: Optional. Configuration instance specifying how the service complies with or can be called according to the guideline template.
